description: password_from slices the value after pass= up to a ; (or end), "" if absent; encrypt is a wrapping Caesar shift leaving non-letters alone; safe_packet replaces the password with its encrypted form.
password_from handles no-password and password-at-end; encrypt wraps z->a and a shift of 0 is unchanged; digits in the password pass through.
safe_packet reuses password_from and encrypt; clear names; a return on every path.
